non_blocking_risks.risk: If the candidate-path universe changes after decision-weighting.json is produced, the weighting result must be recomputed before governance review proceeds.

profile_adherence.evidence: The run stayed autonomous and deep, allowing portfolio preservation, bounded ranking probe, and governance separation to remain explicit without routine confirmation churn.

same_source_consistency.evidence: The portfolio artifacts, weighting artifact, and governance override artifact all refer to the same bounded decision problem and candidate-path set.

cross_format_consistency.evidence: The approximate-best set, weighting result, and override boundary preserve the same route universe rather than silently changing it between modes.

fact_validation_chain.item: Confirm state-space-matrix.json and methodology-portfolio.json establish the candidate-path space.
Confirm optimization-report.json preserves an approximate-best set and explains why not to force a single best too early.
Confirm decision-weighting.json ranks candidates within that stabilized set and records fallback weighting details.
Confirm the ranking is bound to stable candidate identities rather than list position or example numbering.
Confirm override-policy.json and governance-checkpoints.json declare how human review can override automatic ranking.

unverifiable_assumptions.item: The current human reviewer will accept the same candidate-path universe that the portfolio stage preserved.

check.note: state-space-matrix.json, methodology-portfolio.json, research-plan.json, execution-roadmap.json, and optimization-report.json exist.
decision-weighting.json exists and records fallback weighting details.
override-policy.json and governance-checkpoints.json exist and declare human override authority.

scope_alignment_checks.item: The round stays inside source-aligned comparison, weighting, and human-review logic and does not activate runtime governance operations.

check.note: state-space-matrix.json was created before weighting or override logic consumed the candidate-path universe.
governance artifacts exist before final route adoption is treated as complete.

dispatch_recommendations.item: Proceed because portfolio preserves the candidate-path universe, weighting ranks within that universe, and governance owns the final override authority.

check.note: The autonomous deep profile justified one bounded weighting probe inside the portfolio-preserved candidate set and did not let that probe collapse the broader route universe.

check.why: Without it, the candidate-path universe and approximate-best set are not stabilized before weighting begins.
check.evidence: mode-resolution.json explicitly hands optimization-report.json into decision-weighting.json.

check.why: It is the pivot artifact between preserved near-optimal space and final human override authority.
check.evidence: override-policy.json depends on its ranking result without being subordinate to it.

profile_adjustment_recommendation.adjustment_reason: The current profile remained appropriate because one bounded probe improved decision quality without causing mode sprawl.

evaluation_report.score_reason: The example cleanly demonstrates approximate-best preservation, internal ranking, and human override ordering, but still covers only one portfolio-heavy interaction pattern.
